lessons: CRITICAL legal-deadline fix: the EN SKILL.md said the arnona objection (hasaga) deadline is 120 days; the correct figure is 90 days per the 1976 objection law (the HE file was already correct at 90, so this was an EN/HE inconsistency). Fixed 4 EN occurrences.

Three MAJOR eligibility-band errors, all duplicated in the calculator script: (1) disabled bands were 50-74%/75-100% but the real regulation is medical-disability 90%+ -> 40% and earning-incapacity 75%+ -> up to 80% (no 50-74% band); (2) senior/elderly was framed by age (65-69/70+) but is actually by pension/income status (25% pension recipient, 30% income-tested <= avg wage, 100% with income supplement); (3) oleh discount is 12 months chosen within the first 24 months, not the first 12. Renamed the script discount keys to senior-pension/senior-income/senior-supplement/disabled-medical/disabled-incapacity.
Fixed invalid example commands: SKILL.md used --zone A for Tel Aviv, but TA uses numeric zones 1-4; changed to --zone 2.
Added the 2026 national arnona update coefficient (1.626%) to the rates guide; large-family discount reframed as income-tested up to ~30%; student noted as municipality-dependent (~50%).
